description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Update your retirement plan contribution rate so that, if it is below 8%, it is set to 8%, and if it is already at least 8%, it is increased to 10%, then save the change.
tasks.name: Update your retirement plan contribution rate so that, if it is below 8%, it is set to 8%, and if it is already at least 8%, it is increased to 10%, then save the change.
tasks.description: Update your retirement plan contribution rate so that, if it is below 8%, it is set to 8%, and if it is already at least 8%, it is increased to 10%, then save the change.

tasks.instruction: In your main retirement account, move your investments so that 100% of the balance is allocated to a single target-date fund with an expense ratio under 0.50%, choosing the one with the lowest expense ratio among those options.
tasks.name: In your main retirement account, move your investments so that 100% of the balance is allocated to a single target-date fund with an expense ratio under 0.50%, choosing the one with the lowest expense ratio among those options.
tasks.description: In your main retirement account, move your investments so that 100% of the balance is allocated to a single target-date fund with an expense ratio under 0.50%, choosing the one with the lowest expense ratio among those options.

tasks.instruction: Ensure your retirement plan beneficiaries are set so that a spouse receives 70% and a child receives 30%, totaling 100%, adding or editing entries as needed.
tasks.name: Ensure your retirement plan beneficiaries are set so that a spouse receives 70% and a child receives 30%, totaling 100%, adding or editing entries as needed.
tasks.description: Ensure your retirement plan beneficiaries are set so that a spouse receives 70% and a child receives 30%, totaling 100%, adding or editing entries as needed.

tasks.instruction: Using the health benefits tool, compare one silver HMO medical plan and one gold PPO medical plan and enroll in whichever has the lower estimated annual cost, as long as it is under $5,000.
tasks.name: Using the health benefits tool, compare one silver HMO medical plan and one gold PPO medical plan and enroll in whichever has the lower estimated annual cost, as long as it is under $5,000.
tasks.description: Using the health benefits tool, compare one silver HMO medical plan and one gold PPO medical plan and enroll in whichever has the lower estimated annual cost, as long as it is under $5,000.

tasks.instruction: From the available investment options, identify all funds with a risk score of 3 or lower and mark as a favorite the single fund among them that has the highest 1-year return.
tasks.name: From the available investment options, identify all funds with a risk score of 3 or lower and mark as a favorite the single fund among them that has the highest 1-year return.
tasks.description: From the available investment options, identify all funds with a risk score of 3 or lower and mark as a favorite the single fund among them that has the highest 1-year return.

tasks.instruction: Use the retirement calculator to adjust your monthly contribution until the projected balance at your target retirement age is between $500,000 and $520,000, then apply and save that contribution to your plan.
tasks.name: Use the retirement calculator to adjust your monthly contribution until the projected balance at your target retirement age is between $500,000 and $520,000, then apply and save that contribution to your plan.
tasks.description: Use the retirement calculator to adjust your monthly contribution until the projected balance at your target retirement age is between $500,000 and $520,000, then apply and save that contribution to your plan.

tasks.instruction: Update your profile so that your mailing address and mobile phone reflect new values and change your communication preference to email only.
tasks.name: Update your profile so that your mailing address and mobile phone reflect new values and change your communication preference to email only.
tasks.description: Update your profile so that your mailing address and mobile phone reflect new values and change your communication preference to email only.

tasks.instruction: Download the most recent annual pension statement available as a PDF.
tasks.name: Download the most recent annual pension statement available as a PDF.
tasks.description: Download the most recent annual pension statement available as a PDF.

tasks.instruction: Configure an automatic yearly increase to your retirement contribution rate so it rises by 1 percentage point each January until it reaches 12%, then save the rule.

target_names: Default auto-increase rule for current retirement contributions

tasks.name: Configure an automatic yearly increase to your retirement contribution rate so it rises by 1 percentage point each January until it reaches 12%, then save the rule.
tasks.description: Configure an automatic yearly increase to your retirement contribution rate so it rises by 1 percentage point each January until it reaches 12%, then save the rule.
